codeReview.summary: Reviewed both diffs (`ce0a336` and `254dfaa`) against the prior failure. The fix correctly closes the leak by mirroring `createSession` state to `createSessionPackageSecretsRef` via `useEffect` so any `setCreateSession(null)` path (including AppStateBridge `applyBridge`) clears plaintext package secrets. Added tests cover createSession->createProfile->bridge-reset and confirm secret accessor returns empty (`null`) for prior and unknown indices; snapshot security coverage includes this reset path and still reports zero findings.

sharedStateObservations.observation: runtime-worker procedure adherence reporting remains inconsistent when agent-browser is skipped.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: `.factory/skills/runtime-worker/SKILL.md` line 22 requires demo-gallery Playwright to pass when skipping agent-browser and says omissions must set `followedProcedure: false`; lines 46 and 49 list Playwright + manual agent-browser verification steps. Handoff `.../a74062e4-6eeb-4b61-9515-2c5a117ce69e.json` shows `skillFeedback.followedProcedure: true`, while `verification.commandsRun` lists vitest/tsc/lint/format only (no Playwright demo-gallery command and no agent-browser interactive checks).

summary: Pass. The fix feature directly addresses the prior blocking issue by clearing the out-of-band package-secrets ref on bridge-driven `createSession` resets, and test coverage now explicitly exercises that path (including snapshot sweep).
